title: Teucrium joannis
intro: Teucrium joannis, also known as Joannis' germander, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae, commonly found in the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties that may aid in the treatment of various conditions such as digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin infections. The bioactive constituents of Teucrium joannis include diterpenoids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Herbal preparations made from Teucrium joannis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders.
